title: Kitchen Projectiles
body:
*Knives are great for cooking. They're also great for throwing.*

![Collage: A player holding a knife next to his head, knives stuck in blocks at a knife throwing range, a husk taking damage from a thrown knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BYmvNgRP/images/e64d7468c9933365eb69ba2149e61399ab473092.png)

Kitchen Projectiles allows you to throw knives from [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) ([Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)). Knives are thrown just like tridents and deal as much damage as they do for melee attacks.

Knives remember which slot they came from and when picked up return to that slot if it is free, including the offhand.

## Enchantments

Knives can now receive additional enchantments:

### Loyalty

Like a trident, the knife will return to you. 

If the knife is enchanted with Backstabbing, it can still deal damage while returning if it hasn't hit a mob yet. This is a good way to get the damage bonus from Backstabbing without needing invisibility.

Knives also return from the void correctly.

### Multishot

Like a crossbow, you will throw three knives. Only the middle knife can be picked up.

## Compat

- Currently compatible with [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement). Any enchantment will also apply loyalty to the knife, and all sword enchantments work as expected. There are very likely balance issues with this, pending further testing.
- Should work with mods that add new FD knives as long as the knives are added to the `#farmersdelight:tools/knives` tag
- Now available for Neoforge! Requires [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api)
